name: Pangolin

visual_attributes.morphology: Mammal with elongated body covered in large, overlapping scales
distinctive_features: Large keratin scales covering the body
Ability to curl into a ball for protection
Long, sticky tongue for capturing insects
visual_attributes.structural_arrangement: Scales arranged in overlapping layers, similar to a pine cone

functional_attributes.primary_function: Insectivore, primarily consuming ants and termites

domain_specific_functional.DEFENSE_MECHANISM: Curling into a ball and emitting a noxious chemical

contextual_attributes.historical_period: Present, with references in ancient texts
contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: Used in traditional medicine; symbol of conservation efforts

contrastive_constraints: NOT Found outside Asia and sub-Saharan Africa
